items.title: BMO Capital Lifts Amgen (AMGN) Price Target as MariTide Outlook Strengthens
items.description: Amgen Inc. (NASDAQ:AMGN) is included among the 15 Blue Chip Dividend Stocks to Build a Passive Income Porfolio. On December 3, BMO Capital’s Evan Seigerman increased the firm’s price target on Amgen Inc. (NASDAQ:AMGN) to $372 from $335 and reiterated an Outperform rating. items.title: Jim Cramer on Bristol-Myers’ Recent Stock Gain: “Unbelievable”
items.description: Bristol-Myers Squibb Company (NYSE:BMY) is one of the stocks Jim Cramer commented on along with the recent macro rally. items.title: Peptide Therapeutics Market Size to Reach USD 82.19 Billion by 2032; Surging Requirements for Targeted Medicines in Oncology Augment Market Expansion - SNS Insider
items.author: Sns Insider
items.description: The global peptide therapeutics market is projected to grow from USD 46.04 billion in 2024 to USD 82.19 billion by 2032, driven by increasing demand for targeted medicines in oncology, metabolic diseases, and infectious diseases, with significant advancements in peptide synthesis and drug delivery technologies.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Confirmed successful installation of a cutting-edge synthetic peptide production facility, demonstrating technological advancement and strategic investment
